description: Lock Urban Night Watch to source-backed medieval nighttime civic watch duties under the Statute of Winchester and London ward-watch practice.

checks.reason: The corrected node is anchored to the 1285 Statute of Winchester rather than the old Medieval era-default century placeholder.
Municipal fire-watch practice shares the ward-watch, curfew, night patrol, and fire-risk enforcement machinery used by urban night watches.
Clock towers can broadcast time but are not a prerequisite for the Statute of Winchester night-watch duties.
The node covers medieval watch and curfew enforcement, not lamp production or lighting hardware.
